title: Cross-context event log via IDs only
prompt: MyApp.Audit is a bounded context that records events referencing entities from other contexts. An Audit.Event should reference arbitrary entities by (entity_type :string, entity_id :integer) — NOT belongs_to (because Audit cannot import Accounts or Billing). But DO create a compound index on (entity_type, entity_id) in the migration for efficient lookup. Write schema to lib/my_app/audit/event.ex and migration to priv/repo/migrations/20260414000000_create_audit_events.exs.
tier_rationale: Requires context discipline + a pragmatic polymorphic-like pattern using plain fields + compound index. Hard because the ID-only discipline is counter-intuitive.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes plugin: 'Query through the context, not across associations.'
